name_en: ❤️ Black & Color! M13744 Cosmetic Pouch! Collaboration with Takashi Murakami! POCHETTE COSMETIQUE PM. This compact cosmetic pouch is crafted in Monogram canvas and easily fits inside a handbag. The round body with a flat base design makes it convenient for storing makeup. 19.0x 12.0x 6.0 cm
name_cn:
❤️ Black & Color! M13744 Cosmetic Pouch! Collaboration with Takashi Murakami! POCHETTE COSMETIQUE PM. This compact cosmetic pouch is crafted in Monogram canvas and easily fits inside a handbag. The round body with a flat base design makes it convenient for storing makeup. 19.0x 12.0x 6.0 cm
(L x H x W) .- Coated canvas fabric with washable fabric lining
- Gold-tone metal hardware
- Zipper closure
- Internal patch pocket
- Washable fabric lining
